case_title: MARIE K SAYLES VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAYLES, MARIE K AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAYLES, MARIE K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,589.66 PRINCIPAL, $14.77 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,829.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
